text: Inside these glass walls and brightly lit spaces, I feel a sense of anticipation mixed with curiosity. The world outside is quiet, clinical almost, but stepping into the R+D area, I'm greeted by innovation and the optimism of fresh ideas. Here, the boundaries between uncertainty and progress, ambiguity and clarity, are fluid. I'm inspired, standing at the threshold of possibility, where research shapes the future and I, too, am part of this evolving conversation.
